basics.name: Amgad Madkour
basics.label: Engineering Leader
basics.summary: Engineering leader specializing in AI-powered consumer platforms and large-scale systems. Deep expertise in LLMs, knowledge graphs, and data platforms, with a track record of building and scaling high-performing engineering and applied science teams. Proven ability to drive measurable growth, reliability, and efficiency improvements across systems used by millions.

work.name: Microsoft
highlights: Own architecture and execution for Microsoft Copilot Commerce Savings, delivering AI-powered shopping experiences such as product tracking, price alerts, coupons, and cashback to millions of users across Web, Mobile, and Edge.
Drove 2× growth in product tracking within six months through product innovation, platform improvements, and disciplined execution.
Spearheaded Microsoft Autos Marketplace initiatives including Autos Entities, Autos Copilot, and My Garage, contributing to 3× DAU growth and 100% YoY revenue growth.
Built and scaled a multidisciplinary engineering and applied science team from scratch, owning hiring, role definition, leveling, promotions, and performance management.
Partner with product, design, business, and engineering leaders to define roadmap and drive execution across teams.

work.name: Microsoft
highlights: Designed, developed, and fine-tuned ML models for product information extraction in Microsoft Edge, improving accuracy and production reliability at scale.
Reduced compute and storage costs for entity matching workflows by 50% through optimized indexing and candidate generation.
Scaled the Bing Satori knowledge graph entity matching platform on Apache Spark and pioneered adoption of .NET for Spark within the Bing stack.
Built foundational infrastructure for large-scale knowledge graphs, search, and AI-driven experiences.

work.name: IBM
highlights: Co-invented a patented k-partite graph technique for tag recommendation during resource bookmarking.
Developed a spam detection system for social bookmarking using semantic features evaluated across multiple ML algorithms.
Developed Bionoculars, an unsupervised biomedical information extraction system for identifying protein-protein interactions from scientific literature.
Created a machine-assisted human translation system leveraging language models for statistical machine translation.
Collaborated with IBM Watson Research in Yorktown on an unstructured information management platform for knowledge discovery from news.

patents.title: Selecting a data element in a network
